description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed figure holding a child, both rendered in a simplified, stylized manner. The adult figure appears to be wearing a hood or veil, with one hand raised to the chest and the other supporting the child on the left side. The child is nestled closely against the adult, with minimal facial and anatomical details, emphasizing the overall form rather than intricate features. The back of the sculpture is smooth and unadorned, following the contours of the figures. The surface has a matte, slightly rough texture, and the coloration is a uniform earthy brown, suggesting it is made from terracotta or a similar ceramic material. The sculpture is compact and solid, likely intended for display in a public or communal space.
description: A stylized, earthy brown sculpture of a robed figure holding a child, with minimal facial details and a matte, rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robed figure holding a child, with the adult's hand raised to the chest and both figures' faces visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the adult figure and the child, with the hooded head and draped robe visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the sculpture, following the contours of the figures.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the child held closely and the side profile of the adult's robe and hood.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure holding a child
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
